label_verbatim: FIRST: The name and entity type of the domestic nonfiling or foreign nonqualified entity is — (entity name)
rationale: Entity legal name. Form serves both domestic-nonfiling and foreign-nonqualified entities from a single entity.name widget — the SECOND jurisdiction block disambiguates.

Free-text legal type (e.g., 'General Partnership', 'Sole Proprietorship', 'Trust', 'Unincorporated Association'). Entity-typing is unique to this form because nonfiling/nonqualified entities don't have a fixed type-by-form like MBCA-6 (corporation) or MLLC-6 (LLC).
State or country of organization. Reuses the entity.home_jurisdiction key (also used by MLLC-12, MLPA-12A/12B, MBCA-12, MBCA-19, etc. — applies to both domestic and foreign entities here).

label_verbatim: THIRD: The name and address of the Agent for Service of Process is — (name of agent)
rationale: Name of the appointed §112 agent for service of process. Distinct namespace from registered_agent.* (used by formation forms) and clerk.* (used by NP/clerk-change forms) because §112 agents are neither registered nor noncommercial-clerk; they are a third pattern specific to nonfiling/nonqualified entities.

label_verbatim: (physical address – street, city, state and zip code – No P.O. Box)
rationale: Physical address of the §112 agent (single-line; form explicitly prohibits P.O. Box).
Combined name+capacity of the duly authorized officer signing. Shape D (matches MBCA-11, MLLC-12, MBCA-21, MLLC-17).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees (base $100 per page-0 header plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email. Note: nonfiling/nonqualified entities don't typically file annual reports, but the cover-letter widget is present (universal cover-letter primitive).
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space preserved upstream.
